title: Video Mode Mnemonics
text: Video Mode Mnemonics Video mode mnemonics define how the device displays characters in the various video modes and combinations. Arguments Table 1. Mnemonics for View Modes Mnemonic Explanation bli_hig Set video to blink and high intensity. bli_hig_inv Set video to blink, high intensity, and inverse. bli_hig_inv_und Set video to blink, high intensity, inverse, and underscore. bli_hig_und Set video to blink, high intensity, and underscore. bli_inv Set video to blink and inverse. bli_inv_und Set video to blink, inverse, and underscore. bli_und Set video to blink and underscore. blink Set video to blink. hig_inv Set video to high intensity and inverse. hig_inv_und Set video to high intensity, inverse, and underscore. hig_und Set video to high intensity and underscore. high Set video to high intensity. inv_und Set video to inverse and underscore. inverse Set video to inverse. novideo Reset to normal video. underscore Set video to underscore. ^027[0m ^NOVIDEO ^027[28;22;25;4m ^UNDERSCORE ^027[28;22;24;5m ^INVERSE ^027[28;22;5;4m ^INV_UND ^027[28;25;24;1m ^HIGH ^027[28;25;1;4m ^HIG_UND ^027[28;24;1;5m ^HIG_INV ^027[28;1;5;4m ^HIG_INV_UND ^027[22;25;24;8m ^BLINK ^027[22;25;8;4m ^BLI_UND ^027[22;24;8;5m ^BLI_INV ^027[22;8;5;4m ^BLI_INV_UND ^027[25;24;8;1m ^BLI_HIG ^027[25;8;1;4m ^BLI_HIG_UND ^027[24;8;1;5m ^BLI_HIG_INV ^027[8;1;5;4m ^BLI_HIG_INV_UND Copy Related Links Video Attributes Video attributes determine the Uniface index colors used in an application, and additional attributes such as bold, blink, bright and underline used character mode that can be used to highlight current fields and occurrences.
